game.title: Soulscape
game.short_text: Free trapped souls and escape the dark world

details.title: Soulscape
details.description:
About:
Explore the colorful and dark caves of this world, while fighting enemies and freeing souls.
The game has controller rumble, so for the best experience playing with a gamepad is recommended. If the gamepad doesn't work try to restart the game.
Disclaimer: The game doesn't save your progress between play sessions, but you can use cheat codes to help you get back to the game easier. Read about cheat codes below.
Controls:
In the game you have 4 separate abilities which are teached to you at the start of the game: Sprint, dash, melee attack, ranged attack
You can combine these abilities to be more effective in combat:
Hold down the shoot button to shoot a more powerful shot.Dash into enemies to deal damage to them.Press melee attack immediately after dashing to attack further.Press ranged attack immediately after dashing to shoot a more powerful shot without charging it up.Buck bullets with the melee attack.
Other controls:
You can pause the game with the escape key or the menu button.In the pause screen you can enter screenshot mode by pressing H on the keyboard or select on a gamepad. Enabling this will disable all UI while the game is paused.You can mute the music by pressing M.
Cheat codes:
The game is around 20 minutes to complete, but I know that some people will don't have that much time for it, or the game is too hard for them. So I added 2 different cheat codes to the game, so you can easily finish the game and check out the ending. To use a cheat code, just simply start typing the code, no need to open any menu for it. 
The cheat codes:
"unlock" - Set the soul requirement for the end to 0, so you can finish the game any time."killall" - Kills every enemy in the current area you're in.
Social:
Itch page: https://vingames.itch.io/Discord: https://discord.gg/DKpbVKkYoutube: https://youtube.com/channel/UCo-V8qAlHZWFRkUDCtc0cyQTwitter: https://twitter.com/VinarkDev
Credits:
All code and art was made during the one week period of the game jam.Sound effects were downloaded from https://freesound.org/ and modified by me.Music was created by EmInSpace:https://www.youtube.com/c/EmInSpacehttps://www.twitch.tv/eminspaceEmInSpace - itch.io

game.title: Outage
game.short_text: Reconnect the power in this mind-bending puzzle experience!

details.title: Outage
details.description:
[ Placed 6th for Game Design (out of 1,888) in Brackey's 2021.1 Game Jam ][Read about the latest version (1.1.1)]


Outage is an atmospheric puzzle game in which your goal is to reconnect the power to a set of lights through a series of challenging and unique sliding-tile puzzles!
Use W,A,S,D to control the blue player, and the arrow keys to control the pink. Your objective is to get all boxes onto their end goals at the same time. But watch out: there is a third box who responds to both sets of controls. With 20 mind-bending levels to enjoy, Outage can provide (depending on how good you are at it) hours of fun!
Outage saves your progress as you go - allowing you to return to the game whenever you feel up to the challenge. Try to complete the levels in under a given number of moves to turn them golden - can you perfect all 20?


We are super grateful for the kind words and support that our game has received - the positive reception is more than we ever hoped for! Outage has been praised for its game design, challenging levels, atmosphere, environment, artwork, and music. It has also received praise for its polished, well-rounded feel and attention to creating a satisfying gameplay experience. But don't take our word for it, see what players of Outage have had to say!



All levels have been tried and tested! You can find all of the solutions here.

(This is not an exhaustive list of possible solutions. The vast majority of the levels can be solved in multiple different ways!)

game.title: Magnetude
game.short_text: A twin stick action game where you destroy enemies by crushing them with your ships' magnets!

details.title: Magnetude
details.description:
Magnetude is a twin-stick shooter without shooting! By using the powerful magnets in your ships, you can pull your ships together with enough force to crush your enemies!
With a built-in tutorial, learn to survive endless waves of enemies (that gradually get harder!) on 4 different difficulty settings while trying to earn a high score. 
Enemies:
Grunt - A basic nuisance, it'll follow its target to the ends of the universe. It's lack of abilities however makes it great for building big combos!Charger - They've got a need for speed!... Well sometimes. If you see one slow down, then you best be ready for its mad dash!Shooter - While not very mobile, these sly baddies attack from afar by shooting out glowing green globs of acid!Wall (Model in development) - A strange foe that'll punish you for playing poorly! It'll constantly pursue and face one of your ships. The catch is it has large canisters of acid strapped to its ends! Line your ships up well or get a face full of pain!
Don't worry though. There's also helpful power-ups to keep these goons at bay!
Power-Ups:
x2 - While it won't win any awards for defense, this pick-up will double any points you acquire for 10 seconds.Sh - This pick-up will give you a handy shield. Ward off all damage for 5 seconds.TS - Take a breather with Time Stop! Time will freeze all around you for 5 seconds, giving the perfect opportunity to clear the screen.Battery - Filled with a strange glowing fluid, this battery will store an unbelievable amount of energy in you ships! The next time they collide with each other a massive shockwave will get sent out, wiping any foes on its way!
For reading this far, here's a little secret... There's a secret fifth difficulty, but how you unlock it is something you'll have to discover on your own!
Handy tips:
You can influence your ships' trajectories as they fly towards each other! Use this to hit more enemies or to dodge threats!While your ships are connected, they move slightly slower!New enemy types are introduced on every third round, and you earn a health point every fifth round!The slow down before you launch your ships at each other is a great tool for lining up the perfect combo!
Known Issues:

game.short_text: Come to your senses - a linear narrative

details.title: Silence and Darkness
details.description:
After awaking in darkness you slowly come to your senses in this gentle narrative experience.

Controls
Move: a/d or left/right
  
Jump: Space
  
Talk: Click
  
Look: Mouse 
Toggle cursor: M
Toggle Post Proceessing: P
Exit: Escape
About Silence and Darkness
Completed for the Brackey Game Jam 2021.1, this was both my second jam and second game project. The theme was “stronger together”.
  
After vowing to never make a 2D game… I underwent making this 2D game after Tina [who did the game’s art] fielded an interesting idea of using worldly senses, which tied incredibly well to the theme. 
Using Bolt (visual scripting), I underwent making the beast and getting used to 2D. As with my previous jam effort I learnt a real lot in a short space of time. My greatest lesson this time around was in creating reusable, automated systems which will hopefully be able to be recycled down the line.
This second jam has been fantastically motivating and, despite almost giving up early on due to a wealth of confusion and overwhelm, I learnt a huge amount while producing something which I feel is a marked improvement from my previous attempt. 
After the jam I took (far too long) tightening, refining and adding to the game. As such, I'm happy to finally call it a completed project. Hopefully the first of many more to come.
I’d love to know your thoughts after playing, so please do drop a comment or reach out personally.
You can also check out my first project here: https://cinemaleo.itch.io/sacrifices

game.title: JUPITER CONTRACT
game.short_text: cooperative asteroid mining simulator

details.title: JUPITER CONTRACT
details.description:
JUPITER CONTRACTTwo-person (or one, controlling both characters) co-operative asteroid mining simulator.Fly your ship up to an asteroid, mine it, and repeat. Return to the depot when your cargo hold is full. However, keep an eye on your engines (which may need occasional repairs) and the needs of your crew (who may need to occasionally eat and/or sleep).
Controls
Player 1 - [W][S][A][D] to move, [Z][X][C] to interactPlayer 2 - [arrow keys] to move, [,][.][/] (comma, period, and slash) to interactNote: I ran up super hard against the jam deadline and didn't have time to work on any kind of gentle introduction or tutorial. Hopefully the manual below can help to clarify the mechanics.MINING VESSEL OPERATIONS MANUAL
Space travel
The vessel is equipped with two fixed aft-facing main engines, maneuverable from the helm. Travel consists of four stages:
Orient vessel towards targetBurn until roughly halfway to targetRe-orient vessel, pointing bow away from (and main engines towards) targetBurn until full stop
The vessel is equipped with an auto-braking module capable of handling the latter two steps automatically. Engage with [X]/[.], and enjoy the conveniences of modern space travel.
Navigation
The navigational array is capable of locating rocky bodies up to 3 kilometers away. Use [Z] to lock or release a navigational target, which will update the readouts at the helm.
Mining
The vessel is equipped with a MK-04 mining module capable of extracting materials up to 150 meters away. From the mining control station, orient the laser towards any rocky body and engage with [Z]/[,].
When the vessel is at capacity, the navigational console will automatically target the nearest depot at which to deposit ores.
Engine maintenance
Engine failure is rare, but can occur. To mitigate, check the ship's systems display frequently. Many issues can be repaired before they become critical.
Amenities
The mining vessel is equipped with two suitable crew berths and a fully stocked galley, for long-range missions.ABOUTThis game was made for Brackeys game jam 2021.1, is somewhat a follow-up to my previous game KUIPER SHIFT (though very different in theme), and is a prototype for a much larger game I have in my head. If you'd like to see this concept developed further, I'd love to hear from you.Uses fonts: m3x6 by Daniel Linssen, and "3x4 dot font" by piano_no_renshu. The mining vessel is inspired by the tall ship Hawaiian Chieftain.

details.title: Ascent: A Tale of a Thousand Lanterns
details.description:
The Sun has disappeared, and a permanent cloak of night has been cast over the skies. The people of the land deposit the light of their hope on tiny lanterns and send them to the sky, praying that their efforts will be heard by the heavens. Will the lanterns be able to unite and ascend, or will all be cloaked in shadow?
Guide your lantern through where the Sun was last seen rising, and gather other stranded lanterns to ascend to the sky together! 
Fly - control your lantern smoothly in between branches! Illuminate - light the way and fend off the shadows, light shall prevail! Unite - as one, the cluster becomes stronger, allowing you to reach new areas! Attack - engage a light burst capable of vanquishing enemies!
Controls
Use WASD or arrow keys to move the lantern. After a certain amount of lanterns you'll be able to defend yourself with spacebar.For controller, left joystick or the D-Pad moves the player. game.title: INROADS
game.short_text: You and your loyalists are fleeing an enemy army. Survive at all costs, together.

details.title: INROADS
details.description:
--------------------------------------------------
FRA: Ce jeu est aussi disponible en français, appuyez sur le drapeau dans le menu principal.
DEU: Dieses Spiel ist auch auf Deutsch verfügbar, drücken Sie die Flagge im Hauptmenü.
--------------------------------------------------
About
--------------------------------------------------
A game made in only one week where you play as the princess of an endangered legacy: The kingdom of Trija. In exile with a few of her remaining followers, she has to survive for as long as possible while fleeing the enemy army chasing her. Manage each individual ally unit in your camp, send them to expeditions to gather resources and take tough decisions.
--------------------------------------------------
Stronger, together
--------------------------------------------------

The game lets you send one or more units to many simultaneous expeditions in order to gather resources. But when planning them you'll encounter an interesting dilemma: Would you rather send more people together on only one expedition and increase their chances of survival, or would you rather send as many expeditions running in parallel as possible, taking the risk of failing all of them?
In this game about being in exile, you'll make tough decision, such as rejecting or accepting other migrants, sacrificing some of your crew and fleeing at the cost of leaving some behind. To which extent will you manage to stay stronger together ?
--------------------------------------------------
Inroads
--------------------------------------------------

/ˈɪnˌroʊdz/ - According to merriam-webster.com :
"Inroad is a combination of in and road, both of which are pretty mundane, as far as words go. But the first-and oldest-meaning of inroad hints at a meaning of road other than the "way for traveling" one. Beginning back in the days of Old English, road referred to an armed hostile incursion made on horseback. (Raid comes from this use of road and also formerly specified incursions on horseback.) Road has lost all of its former violent connotations, and inroad is shedding its as well. While inroads are often made at the expense of someone or something, they are at times simply advances, as when an artist is said to be making inroads into a community.
--------------------------------------------------
Credits
--------------------------------------------------

A game by the international Nimble Beasts collective!
Mago the installation wizzard - Code, Art assist, German localizationsZach - Code, Design assistAnicet Nougaret - Game design, Art, Writing, Code assist, French localizationsmaestro SpaceCastle - Original soundtrack and sound effects
